caption: A man with a light-colored, upright, textured wig and glasses sits in a recording studio, wearing a white shirt with a red bow tie and black headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items, including a garment with the word "LEE" visible. To the right of the man, a white sign is partially visible. On-screen logos appear on both sides of the frame; on the left is a logo that says "PODCAST" below a stylized "P" and the word "STALID", and on the right is a red and white logo that reads "TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, with his mouth opening and closing, while his head and body remain relatively stationary.
